content:
# Session 12 (iter-012) ‚Äî review summary

## Metadata
- Sorry: **FBC 5‚Üí5**, **SNAP 6‚Üí7** (net +1; SNAP assembly own-body closed, +2 isolated half-lemmas).
- Global: no sorry ELIMINATED on either route. **4th consecutive 0-net-elimination iter** (FBC
  4‚Üí4‚Üí5‚Üí5‚Üí5; SNAP 5‚Üí6‚Üí6‚Üí6‚Üí7). 0 new axioms; blueprint-doctor clean; sync_leanok ran (iter 12,
  sha b2e018f, +4/-0). Both files cold-build exit 0 (no kernel timeout in committed state).
- Targets: FBC `gammaPushforwardIso_comp`; SNAP associator-bridge assembly + 2 half-lemmas.

## FBC `gammaPushforwardIso_comp` ‚Äî BLOCKED, blocker re-characterised (decisive new fact)
- 4 new compiling helpers (all `:= rfl`/`subst;rfl`, kernel-light, axiom-clean): `moduleCat_eqToHom_concreteCategory_apply`
  (L696), `gammaPushforwardIso_hom_concreteApply` (L706), `restrictScalars_map_concreteApply` (L713),
  `restrictScalarsComp_inv_app_concreteApply` (L720).
- Goal pushed from iter-011's opaque `Œì(cast) x = x` to fully-exposed `x = B(A(Œ≥_œÜ(Œì_pc(cast x))))`,
  every layer named (B = restrictScalarsComp.inv.app, A = restrictScalars.map Œ≥_œÅ, Œ≥_œÜ =
  gammaPushforwardIso œÜ, Œì_pc = moduleSpecŒìFunctor.map pushforwardComp.inv.app).
- **The iter-011/planner premise was FALSE.** Planner assumed only the cast is genuine and B/A/Œ≥_œÜ
  collapse by `gammaPushforwardIso_{hom,inv}_apply`. They do not. The genuine obstruction is the
  `X.Modules`/value-`ModuleCat` **object-junction diamond**, broader than the cast:
  - carrier-defeq is CHEAP (`rfl : ‚Üë(Œì(pushforward (Spec(œÜ‚â´œÅ)) N)) = ‚Üë(Œì(pushforward (Spec œÅ ‚â´ Spec œÜ) N))`
    typechecks instantly ‚Äî VERIFIED) but **per-junction OBJECT-defeq is HEAVY** (whnf kernel bomb).
  - `rw`/`simp [helper]` fails on Œ≥_œÜ and B (motive not type correct: rewriting `Œ≥_œÜ z ‚Üí z` retypes z
    across the diamond). A/inner-Œ≥_œÅ DO fire (under `restrictScalars.map`, a syntactic junction).
- **Three collapse routes VERIFIED-FAIL on cold build** (see milestones attempts 1-3): whole-goal
  defeq, monolithic `rfl`, term-mode `Eq.trans` chain (>1.6M heartbeats). The element-wise-collapse
  FAMILY is provably exhausted.
- **No LLM API key in env** (`archon-informal-agent` unavailable ‚Äî VERIFIED), so the prover could not
  run the analogist consult itself.

## SNAP associator bridge ‚Äî GATING cleared, assembly closed, both halves at precise Œº-blocker
- **GATING (Step 0) RESOLVED:** `assocCommonForm` (L1847) ‚Äî well-typed common form `K`, a 5-factor
  composite = blueprint 4-factor schematic PLUS a seg-1 inverse-whiskered-unit prefix
  `(L'(Œ∑_{a‚äób} ‚ñ∑ c))‚Åª¬π` (the "counit object-glue" re-basing the domain to `tensorObj (tensorObj A B) C`).
  Typechecks (needed `@asIso ‚Ä¶ (isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit ‚Ä¶)`).
- **Assembly RESOLVED (own body sorry-free):** `tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator := hK_lhs.trans hK_rhs.symm`
  (L1968). `.trans/.symm` typechecks ‚Üí confirms K matches both halves.
- **hK_rhs (L1960) PARTIAL, substantially advanced:** `rw [tensorObjAssoc]` + unfold ‚Üí both sides share
  the seg-1 prefix; **two `congrArg (fun t => _ ‚â´ t)`** strip it; `slice_lhs 1 3 => erw [hcol]`
  collapses braiding-conjugated whiskered unit (segments 3-5) to `(A ‚óÅ Œ∑_{b‚äóc})^#`; `erw [sheafification_whiskerLeft_unit_eq_mu']`
  places keystone Œº.hom adjacent to Œº.inv from `i_{A,B‚äóC}` (identical object). **BLOCKER:** the Œº-pair
  does NOT cancel even on this small isolated goal ‚Äî keystone inner-`‚â´` is `Localization.Monoidal`
  comp, boundary `‚â´ Œº.inv` is `X.Modules`-synonym comp (defeq NOT syntactic); `Category.assoc` can't
  bridge; `simp [Localization.Monoidal.Œº]` times out at isDefEq.
- **hK_lhs (L1903) PARTIAL:** unfolds to isolated localized-side goal (no whiskered unit). **BLOCKER:**
  `Localization.Monoidal.associator_hom_app` won't fire on `(Œ±_ A B C).hom` (needs objects literally
  `(L').obj _`). Route: push counit isos through via `associator_naturality` first.
- **Key correction to iter-011:** isolation into half-assemblies does NOT by itself let
  `Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc` fire ‚Äî the comp-instance mismatch persists on the small goal.

## Subagent findings (reports in logs/iter-012/)
- **lean-auditor iter012** (0 must-fix / 5 major / 3 minor): 6 new helpers kernel-light + correct;
  `assocCommonForm` well-typed; assembly sorry-free own-body. **MAJOR ‚Äî iter-011 LATENT BUG STILL
  UNFIXED:** `set_option maxHeartbeats` at FlatBaseChange.lean **L1488** and **L1523-1526** scope to
  `/-! ... -/` section comments, NOT the theorems ‚Äî `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose` (L1546) runs
  under DEFAULT budget; will silently starve when its sorry is filled. Minor: stale iter-NNN comments
  (FBC L183-248; SNAP planning blocks); transitively-sorry-backed instances `instGMonoid/Semiring/CommSemiring`
  undocumented.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker fbc012** (0 must-fix / 2 major): Lean faithful, 4 helpers genuine. MAJOR:
  (1) chapter proof of `lem:gammaPushforwardIso_comp` points content at `globalSectionsIso_hom_comp3_specMap_appTop`
  but that lemma never enters the realised attempt ‚Äî real blocker is the object-junction diamond, prose
  understates it (‚Üí I added `% NOTE`). (2) stale Lean docstring L813 "pointwise reflexivity" for
  `gammaPushforwardNatIso_comp` (blueprint already corrected at L917; the `.lean` docstring is stale ‚Äî
  prover-fix, can't edit from review).
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker snap012** (0 must-fix / 2 major / 1 minor): Lean faithful, hK `\lean{}`
  hints match, statements non-fake. MAJOR: (1) chapter `K` is 4-factor, Lean `assocCommonForm` is
  5-factor (seg-1 prefix omitted from schematic); `assocCommonForm` has no `\lean{}` block. (2) hK_lhs
  prose calls the Œº-cancel a "whnf-at-scale artifact" fixed by cheap `show`/`change` ‚Äî CONTRADICTED by
  the prover's comp-instance-mismatch finding (‚Üí I added `% NOTE`).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`, `lem:gammaPushforwardIso_comp` (proof block): added `% NOTE:` ‚Äî
  proof prose understates the object-junction diamond blocker; cited 3-fold coherence never enters the
  realised attempt; iter-013 = sheaf-level route. Flags a blueprint-writer rewrite.
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs` (proof block): added `% NOTE:` ‚Äî the
  "isolation note / whnf-at-scale artifact" prose is contradicted by the verified comp-instance
  mismatch; iter-013 question = instance-agnostic `e.hom;e.inv` cancel across the LocalizedMonoidal
  boundary. Flags a blueprint-writer rewrite.
- No `\leanok` overrides (sync ran iter-012, sha b2e018f, consistent with sorry status). No `\mathlibok`
  (new decls are project rfl-helpers, not Mathlib-backed). No `\lean{}` renames (snap checker confirmed
  hints match). No stale `\notready` to strip (no blocks landed this iter).

## Coverage debt (unmatched Lean, NEW this iter ‚Äî for the planner to blueprint)
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.assocCommonForm` (SNAP L1847) ‚Äî the well-typed `K` (5-factor, seg-1
  unit prefix). Depends on `tensorObjAssoc`/`tensorObjLocalizedIso`/`isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit`.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.moduleCat_eqToHom_concreteCategory_apply` (FBC L696) ‚Äî generic ModuleCat
  eqToHom‚Üícarrier-cast (`subst;rfl`).
- `AlgebraicGeometry.gammaPushforwardIso_hom_concreteApply` (FBC L706) ‚Äî ConcreteCategory.hom-keyed
  twin of `gammaPushforwardIso_hom_apply`.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.restrictScalars_map_concreteApply` (FBC L713).
- `AlgebraicGeometry.restrictScalarsComp_inv_app_concreteApply` (FBC L720).
- (~70 pre-existing `RelativeTensorCoequalizer.*`/`W_*` impl helpers remain DEFERRED to the SNAP
  file-split refactor ‚Äî unchanged backlog, not new.)

## LOW notes
- FBC `.lean` docstring L813 ("pointwise reflexivity") is stale (only a prover can fix; recommend next FBC prover round).
- SNAP `instGMonoid/instGSemiring/instGCommSemiring` docstrings don't flag their transitive sorry through `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`.
